title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: nftables bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for nftables is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: nftables provides a packet-filtering tool, with numerous improvements in convenience, features, and performance. It is the designated successor to iptables, ip6tables, arptables and ebtables.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update expected test suite results in SRPM (JIRA:RHEL-126817)

full_text:
An update for nftables is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

nftables provides a packet-filtering tool, with numerous improvements in convenience, features, and performance. It is the designated successor to iptables, ip6tables, arptables and ebtables.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update expected test suite results in SRPM (JIRA:RHEL-126817)
